name: Credit Building Professionals
description_short: Credit Building Professionals is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 4.6/5 with 70 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Credit Building Professionals is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 4.6/5.0 Google rating from 70 reviews, Credit Building Professionals has an excellent reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a bankruptcy service, business networking company, divorce service, Credit Building Professionals provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Credit Building Professionals operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering Credit Building Professionals should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
